description: High-load dashboard using pre-computed recording rules. Designed for 20+ pod deployments with concurrent load tests. Requires llm-d-recording-rules PrometheusRule to be deployed.

panels.description: Combined prompt + generation tokens per second by model and pod
panels.title: Total Token Throughput (prompt + generation)

panels.description: Generation tokens per second by model and pod
panels.title: Generation Token Rate

panels.description: Prompt tokens per second by model and pod
panels.title: Prompt Token Rate

panels.description: End-to-end request latency percentiles (pre-computed)
panels.title: E2E Request Latency

panels.description: Inference objective request latency percentiles (platform-level)
panels.title: Inference Objective Latency

panels.description: Time to first token percentiles (pre-computed)
panels.title: Time To First Token

panels.description: TTFT for decode-only instances in P/D disaggregation (in ms)
panels.title: TTFT - Decode Instances (P/D)

panels.description: Inter-token latency percentiles (pre-computed)
panels.title: Inter-Token Latency

panels.description: Number of requests currently running per pod
panels.title: Requests Running

panels.description: Number of requests waiting in queue per pod
panels.title: Requests Waiting

panels.description: KV cache utilization per pod (1.0 = 100%)
panels.title: KV Cache Utilization

panels.description: Prefill and decode phase median durations (pre-computed)
panels.title: Prefill / Decode Phase Duration (P50)

panels.description: Prefill and decode worker utilization for P/D disaggregation
panels.title: P/D Worker Utilization

panels.description: KV cache transfer time percentiles in ms (pre-computed)
panels.title: KV Transfer Time

panels.description: KV transfer post time percentiles in ms (pre-computed)
panels.title: KV Transfer Post Time

panels.description: Bytes transferred per KV transfer in MB (pre-computed)
panels.title: KV Transfer Size

panels.description: NIXL descriptors per transfer (pre-computed)
panels.title: NIXL Descriptors per Transfer

panels.description: Failed KV transfers
panels.title: Failed KV Transfers

panels.description: EPP end-to-end and plugin processing latency P99 (pre-computed)
panels.title: EPP / Plugin Latency (P99)

panels.description: Scheduler health and request distribution
panels.title: Request Distribution (QPS per instance)

panels.description: Error rate as a ratio of total requests
panels.title: Overall Error Rate

panels.description: Error rate by model
panels.title: Per-Model Error Rate

panels.description: Request preemptions per pod
panels.title: Request Preemptions

panels.description: Prefix cache hit rate (hits / queries)
panels.title: Prefix Cache Hit Rate

panels.description: Per-pod prefix cache hit rate
panels.title: Per-Instance Cache Hit Rate

panels.description: Request success rate and request rate by model
panels.title: Request Rate by Model

panels.description: Finished requests by reason (stop, length, abort)
panels.title: Finish Reason

title: llm-d High Load Overview
